description: pgEdge provides enterprise-grade open source PostgreSQL for AI, high availability, and distributed workloads. Its product set includes a Postgres MCP server, an agentic AI toolkit, enterprise Postgres, distributed multi-master Postgres, and managed cloud offerings.
summary: pgEdge exposes a Postgres MCP server over streamable HTTP plus a Go-based `pgedge` CLI client; both use locally managed bearer API tokens for authenticated access.
